cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. First, I need to look at the information given. Leslie woke up at 5am. Then there are several people who saw Leslie doing different activities at different times. The beach was closed after 10pm. So Leslie had to go to the beach before 10pm. Let me list out all the times Leslie was seen doing things: - Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. - Anthony saw Leslie at the theater from 9am to 11am. - Thomas saw Leslie at the bakery from 11am to 4pm. - Ashley saw Leslie at the electronics store from 4pm to 5pm. - Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm.
